sourceMovie.title: New Police Story
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto New Police Story (2004) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Double Impact
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If New Police Story clicked for you, Double Impact (1991) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after New Police Story?
faq.answer: Try Double Impact, Lethal Weapon, Lethal Weapon 3—each shares DNA with New Police Story while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is New Police Story?
faq.answer: New Police Story (2004) is best described as Action, Thriller, Crime, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is New Police Story part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Police Story Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
